---
title: "Analyse questionnaire TF/PTF"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

This quarto report shows how the data from the questionnaire can be extracted and printed. Further analysis of the literature findings can proceed from here onwards.

```{r, echo = F, warning=F, message=F}
library(tidyverse) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
library(googlesheets4) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
library(DT) |> suppressPackageStartupMessages()
```


Importing the data can be set up with a user-defined function:

```{r, message=F}
source(here::here("source/R/import-data-questionnaire.R"))

url_sheet <- paste0("https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/",
                    "13Qcj2Eg_oI9aUy7vL_34XdF-oucMppBdhk2w70AQMHk/",
                    "edit?usp=sharing")

data <- import_data_questionaire(url_sheet)
```

We print some selected columns:

```{r, echo = F}
data %>%
  select(unique_id, english, data_public, code_public, 
         tf_ptf, soildescriptor, ref_method, url_pdf) %>%
  DT::datatable(rownames = F)
```
